{{Infobox character
| name = Angelwing
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Angelwing]] is a mid-level [[Advocate]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15">''The Engineer'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Angelwing]] utilizes a purple mech armor with energy wings.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Angelwing]] provided footage of the incident.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
